name: Alice Margatroid's Dress Up
description:
(featuring Marisa Kirisame)

Somehow, you became Alice's personal model for her new hobby - making clothes and accessories. And she will try to put anything and everything on you - even if it might not fit...

To make things more interesting, Marisa supports her hobby - from gathering materials up to offering various potions and items for a flair of magic effects. And she even comes to visit on occasion...

Image Source (Danbooru)

Here's another Touhou bot~! Wanted to try something cute and tame (if you want it to be) - though still leaving my favorite things in it. This also defines two characters but your main focus is on Alice.

First greeting is to get into things quick, while the second one is my attempt at giving Alice a varied outfit every chat.

Might tweak personalities or greeting(s) later.

...Also I might have developed a weird kinship with Alice in the process of making this bot. I think.
creator: nightruby
